response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise required for this role. Their recent work focuses on full-stack, AI, and web technologies rather than low-latency financial systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong communication skills and knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows (mandatory for the role).
Lacks domain expertise in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking.
Recent roles emphasize full-stack/web development, not low-latency or financial systems.
